project.name: Blonde Blazer Romance
project.objective: Create a romantic short-form fashion promo with a premium editorial feel.

global_style.reference_policy: Use general_reference_assets as global context for the whole film and scene reference_assets only for their matching scene. use_asset controls whether an asset is active. asset_type tells the pipeline whether the file should be treated as image or video.

general_reference_assets.path: Supporting Data/general_assets/video/general/Dispatch all Blonde Blazer Romance Scenes.mp4
general_reference_assets.label: primary romance promo motion reference
general_reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use this as global context for pacing, elegant movement, color treatment, and fashion-promo rhythm.

scenes.name: Scene 1
scenes.description: A close beauty shot of the blonde blazer lead talent locking eye contact with the camera, then giving a subtle confident smile.
scenes.text overlay: Fall in love with the look
scenes.subject: lead_talent
scenes.notes: Use the face and wardrobe references for identity and styling. Global references under global_style inform the whole video.

reference_assets.label: lead talent face reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Preserve the lead talent's facial proportions, blonde styling, camera-facing expression, and premium beauty-ad framing.

reference_assets.label: blonde blazer wardrobe reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use this for blazer color, fit, neckline, and luxury fashion styling.

reference_assets.label: close-up composition reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use this for crop, lens feel, eye contact, and soft editorial lighting.
